Clinical_Goal: Predict which patients are likely to be readmitted within 30 days of discharge.
Suggested_Features: Age, comorbidities, length of stay, previous admissions, discharge disposition, insurance type
Clinical_Significance: Reducing readmissions improves quality metrics, patient satisfaction, and reduces costs under value-based care.
Learner_Guidance: Use the provided Patient_Readmission_Risk.csv dataset to explore this scenario. Ideal for demonstrating end-to-end ML workflow.

Scenario: Patient Deterioration in the Emergency Department
Clinical_Goal: Identify patients at risk of rapid clinical deterioration within 6 hours of triage.
Suggested_Features: Vital signs, triage acuity, arrival mode, age, comorbidities, chief complaint
Clinical_Significance: Early detection helps prioritize care and prevent adverse events in high-volume ED settings.
Learner_Guidance: Focus on bias and fairness analysis across demographic groups, using Azure Responsible AI Dashboard.

Clinical_Goal: Predict patients at risk of developing sepsis during hospitalization.
Suggested_Features: Temperature, heart rate, respiratory rate, WBC count, blood pressure trends
Clinical_Significance: Timely identification allows for early intervention, reducing mortality.
Learner_Guidance: Best suited for teams with access to simulated clinical datasets including vital signs.

Clinical_Goal: Estimate expected hospital stay duration based on patient and clinical factors.
Suggested_Features: Admission type, diagnosis, vitals, comorbidities, procedures performed
Clinical_Significance: Supports bed management and discharge planning efficiency.
Learner_Guidance: Consider regression models in Azure ML Designer and visualize distribution trends in Power BI.

Clinical_Goal: Predict the likelihood that a hospitalized patient will require ICU transfer.
Suggested_Features: Vital signs, lab abnormalities, early warning scores, comorbidity burden
Clinical_Significance: Prevents delayed escalations and supports early intervention strategies.
Learner_Guidance: Ideal for exploring model validation and temporal analysis using Azure ML validation tools.

Clinical_Goal: Predict disease progression or readmission for chronic conditions like CHF.
Suggested_Features: Ejection fraction, BNP levels, medication adherence, weight, age
Clinical_Significance: Improves long-term management and helps allocate case management resources.
Learner_Guidance: Use feature importance and SHAP visualizations to explain predictions to clinicians.

Clinical_Goal: Predict likelihood of complications after surgery (e.g., infection, reoperation).
Suggested_Features: Type of surgery, age, BMI, anesthesia duration, comorbidities
Clinical_Significance: Enhances perioperative safety and informed consent discussions.
Learner_Guidance: Use Power BI to display feature importance and complication rates by procedure type.

Clinical_Goal: Predict whether patients will miss scheduled outpatient appointments.
Suggested_Features: Appointment type, distance, age, past attendance, insurance status
Clinical_Significance: Supports patient engagement strategies and operational efficiency.
Learner_Guidance: Integrate prediction results into a scheduling or population health dashboard.

Clinical_Goal: Predict mortality risk to support early triage and resource allocation.
Suggested_Features: Age, oxygen saturation, lab results, comorbidities, vital trends
Clinical_Significance: Enables risk stratification and shared decision-making.
Learner_Guidance: Emphasize ethical and fairness considerations when building mortality prediction models.

Clinical_Goal: Identify patients likely to return to the ED within 72 hours or 30 days.
Suggested_Features: Age, diagnosis, social factors, discharge instructions, insurance type
Clinical_Significance: Improves follow-up planning and social work referrals.
Learner_Guidance: Include social determinants of health (SDoH) features to enhance fairness and real-world relevance.
